      Grp.isoMk e' (by exact h_mon)
    have : (diagFunctor (Spec R)).essImage G := ⟨.op (.of A), ⟨e''⟩⟩
    exact diagFunctor_essImage_iff_span_isGroupLikeElem_eq_top.mp this
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨A, ⟨e⟩⟩ := diagFunctor_essImage_iff_span_isGroupLikeElem_eq_top.mpr h
    exact ⟨A.unop, inferInstance, e.hom.left, e.hom.left.IsOver, e.hom.isMonHom⟩
